text: The department shall suspend the driving privilege of any person upon receiving notice from another state that the person’s driving privilege in that state has been suspended for failure to meet the financial responsibility provisions of the law in that state, if the suspension in that state was taken on grounds that would have resulted in a suspension in this state.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 7. FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY LAWS [16000 - 16560]
### Chapter 1. Compulsory Financial Responsibility [16000 - 16078]
#### Article 4. Suspensions [16070 - 16078]
##### § 16071

The department shall suspend the driving privilege of any person upon receiving notice from another state that the person’s driving privilege in that state has been suspended for failure to meet the financial responsibility provisions of the law in that state, if the suspension in that state was taken on grounds that would have resulted in a suspension in this state.

*(Amended (as amended by Stats. 1996, Ch. 1126, Sec. 12) by Stats. 1999, Ch. 880, Sec. 17. Effective January 1, 2000.)*
